language.translate: язык, речь, брань, стиль, язык писателя, языковой
mnemonic: language [лэ'нгвич] язык - От слова (ленгвич-стика*), т.е. язык-ознание (*Лингвистика).

language ['læŋgwɪdʒ]
***
Любой ЯЗЫК для меня сленг (вич). (это) language
Ем я сэндвич и учу ЯЗЫК лэнгвич. (это) language

examples.eng: Don't use bad language.
How many languages do you speak?
Language is the mirror of society.
Her language is very slangy.
examples.ru: В её речи очень много жаргона.

examples.eng: They abandoned their native language.
examples.ru: Они перестали говорить на своём родном языке.

examples.eng: TC language
His language was often crude.
examples.ru: Он часто не стеснялся в выражениях.

examples.eng: What's the best way to learn a language?
The official language of Ghana is English.
Latin is a dead language.
English is becoming a global language.
I didn't speak much Japanese, and I was worried that the language barrier might be a problem.
examples.ru: Я плохо говорил по-японски, и боялся, что из-за языкового барьера у меня могут возникнуть проблемы.

examples.eng: The language was strange to me.
a stranger unversed in their language
Describe it in ordinary everyday language.
The aboriginal peoples of northern Alaska are known as Inupiats, which in their language literally means “real people”
examples.ru: Коренные народы Северной Аляски известны как "инупиаты", что на их языке буквально означает “настоящие люди”.

examples.eng: Chinese is a tonal language.
French is her first language.
the arcane language of the law
sanitize the language in a book
the phonetic units of a language
the written form of the language
German is an inflected language.
the formal language of the report
the syntactic rules of a language
Andrea's native language is German.
Many of the deaf use sign language.
examples.ru: Многие глухие люди пользуются языком жестов.

examples.eng: the child's acquisition of language
the attribution of language to birds
the beauty of Shakespeare's language
